items.name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. The new small leather goods series playfully uses vibrant colors to present eye-catching new works. This shoulder bag features a classic silhouette, cleverly paired with a button closure and internal hook clasp for easy attachment of matching wallets or clutches. The new light blue and brown GG canvas complements the brown leather trim, while the double-G accessories add a bright touch.
Model: 783141.
Size: 16.5(W)x 9.5(H)x 4.5cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.

items.name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Marmont series small denim shoulder bag
items.name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Marmont series small denim shoulder bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. This small chain shoulder bag from the GG Marmont series features a soft yet structured design, equipped with a large flap buckle decorated with double-G accessories. The chain shoulder strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile carrying methods that allow for free switching between shoulder and handbag styles.
Model: 443497.
Size: 26(W)x 15(H)x 7cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.

Big Ball ~ Calfskin 🐂
Classic quilted design with leather-wrapped metal chain

Super great upgrade design~💕

Model: 0250woc

items.name_en: Wow wow wow wow wow 👍 Super many compartments, new plaid military backpack is here ✌🏻 With B-shaped zipper pullers, two tightening pockets on the sides for water bottles ✔️ The bag has 4 external pockets 😘 and 2 internal compartments ❤ Wow... holding the textbooks of students, mainly can be sorted and stored separately 👍 convenient 👍 files or laptops, all accommodated 👍 The handle is also designed very well, it doesn't hurt the hand no matter how heavy it is, the handle is padded with comfortable, elegant foam
items.name_cn:
Wow wow wow wow wow 👍 Super many compartments, new plaid military backpack is here ✌🏻 With B-shaped zipper pullers, two tightening pockets on the sides for water bottles ✔️ The bag has 4 external pockets 😘 and 2 internal compartments ❤ Wow... holding the textbooks of students, mainly can be sorted and stored separately 👍 convenient 👍 files or laptops, all accommodated 👍 The handle is also designed very well, it doesn't hurt the hand no matter how heavy it is, the handle is padded with comfortable, elegant foam
Material: % Imported pure cotton / Imported calfskin!
Must-have for students 👍 Must-have for business trips and travel 👍 Must-have for daily work 👍 Size 31✕16✕46cm

items.name_en: Wow✨Twilly has so many uses. The most common use is wrapping around handbag handles. Girls with long hair can use it to tie their hair, super gentle ☺️. In summer, it can be a small scarf or tied around the wrist. It is a small accessory with many uses. This one, needless to say, is absolutely explosively good-looking 💥~

items.name_en: YSL Calfskin WOC Small Envelope Bag. This is a must-have! Made from original factory grain calfskin, structured shape, comfortable to the touch. Removable shoulder strap allows it to be used as a clutch or evening bag. Multiple card slots, very practical. Take your phone and cards, and you're ready to go.

items.name_en: YSL Classic Legend Fashion Meets Romance❓ The original YSL leather texture embodies this attribute. It is hard to describe how charming it is; it has a magic that captivates you. It is a basic essential in many women's wardrobes, allowing you to create a simple yet textured look with plenty of accents💋Size: 30 Model 26821
